overview.tagline: A small, quiet borough offering peaceful residential living and strong community bonds
overview.description: The Borough of Allendale is a small, predominantly residential community in northwestern Bergen County. Known for its quiet neighborhoods, excellent schools, and tight-knit community, Allendale provides an idyllic setting for families seeking suburban living with easy access to the New York metropolitan area. The borough is also home to a section of the Celery Farm, a renowned natural area and birding destination.
overview.schoolDistrict: Allendale Public Schools (K-8) / Northern Highlands Regional High School District (9-12)
highlights: The Celery Farm — 107-acre freshwater wetland and birding preserve
Excellent K-8 schools and top-ranked Northern Highlands Regional High School
NJ Transit train service on the Main Line from Allendale station
Small-town atmosphere with active community organizations
Low crime rate and safe, walkable neighborhoods

realEstate.assessmentInfo: Property assessments are handled through the Bergen County Tax Board. The borough maintains assessment records and conducts periodic revaluations.
realEstate.recentTrends: Allendale's real estate market has seen steady appreciation driven by the strong school system and desirable small-town character. Inventory remains limited, and homes in good condition sell quickly. New construction and renovations of older homes are common.
neighborhoodNotes: Downtown/Station area — Close to the NJ Transit train station and borough center
Brookside Avenue area — Established neighborhood with mature trees and larger lots
Mallinson neighborhood — Newer construction and well-maintained colonials
Celery Farm vicinity — Properties near the nature preserve with scenic surroundings
West Allendale — Quiet streets with a mix of ranch and colonial-style homes

trashCollection.title: Trash Collection
trashCollection.description: Curbside trash pickup is provided by a contracted private hauler for the Borough of Allendale.
details: Twice-weekly pickup on designated days
Trash must be placed curbside by 6:00 AM on collection day
Use approved containers with lids; maximum 50 lbs per container
Bulk item pickup available by appointment with the hauler
Holiday schedule changes posted on borough website

recycling.title: Recycling
recycling.description: Weekly curbside recycling collection is provided by the borough's contracted hauler.
details: Single-stream recycling: glass, cans, plastics #1-#7, paper, and cardboard
Recycling bins available from the borough
Yard waste collected curbside during designated seasonal periods
Leaf collection available in fall months
Bergen County Utilities Authority recycling drop-off available

waterSewer.title: Water & Sewer
waterSewer.description: Water and sewer service is managed by the Borough of Allendale with water supplied through the regional system.
details: Water supplied through the regional water system
Quarterly billing for water and sewer service
Water quality reports available annually
Sewer maintenance handled by the borough DPW
After-hours water emergencies handled through the police department

permits.title: Building & Permits
permits.description: The Building Department handles construction permits, inspections, and code enforcement.
details: Permits required for all construction, renovations, and additions
Zoning Board and Planning Board handle variance and site plan applications
Permit applications available at Borough Hall
Inspections scheduled through the Building Department
Certificate of Occupancy required before moving into new or renovated structures

parking.title: Parking
parking.description: The Borough maintains commuter parking near the Allendale train station and limited public parking in the town center.
details: Commuter parking permits available at the train station lot
Permit waiting list may apply for commuter spots
Free parking at the Allendale Community Pool and parks
No overnight on-street parking without police notification

additionalServices.title: Lee Memorial Library
additionalServices.description: Public library serving Allendale residents with books, media, programs, and digital resources.
details: Located at 500 West Crescent Avenue
Children's programs, story times, and summer reading
Part of the Bergen County Cooperative Library System (BCCLS)
Community room available for meetings and events

additionalServices.title: Recreation Department
additionalServices.description: Recreation programs and facilities for Allendale residents.
details: Youth sports programs including soccer, baseball, and basketball
Allendale Swim Club (community pool) with summer memberships
Adult recreation programs and fitness classes
Summer camp programs for children

noise.title: Noise Ordinance
noise.summary: Allendale enforces noise ordinances to maintain the quiet, residential character of the borough.
keyRules: Construction noise prohibited before 7:00 AM and after 6:00 PM on weekdays
Saturday construction allowed 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM only
No construction noise on Sundays or federal holidays
Power equipment (leaf blowers, mowers) restricted before 8:00 AM on weekends
Loud music and disturbances prohibited after 10:00 PM

propertyMaintenance.title: Property Maintenance
propertyMaintenance.summary: Homeowners and property owners must maintain their properties in accordance with borough standards.
keyRules: Lawns must be mowed and maintained; grass not to exceed 10 inches
Sidewalks must be cleared of snow and ice within 24 hours of a storm
No junk, debris, or inoperable vehicles on residential properties
Fences not to exceed 6 feet in rear yards and 4 feet in front yards
Dead trees and hazardous limbs must be removed promptly

pets.title: Pet Regulations
pets.summary: Allendale requires dog licensing and enforces leash and waste cleanup laws.
keyRules: All dogs over 7 months must be licensed annually
Current rabies vaccination required for license
Dogs must be on a leash at all times when off the owner's property
Pet waste must be cleaned up immediately by the owner
Nuisance barking subject to fines after warnings

parking.title: Parking Regulations
parking.summary: On-street parking in Allendale is regulated to maintain safety and access in residential areas.
keyRules: No overnight parking on borough streets between 2:00 AM and 6:00 AM
Snow emergency parking bans require vehicles off-street
Commercial vehicles over 4 tons may not park on residential streets overnight
Parking at the train station lot requires a valid commuter permit
Violations subject to fines and possible towing

rentals.title: Rental Property Regulations
rentals.summary: Rental properties must comply with borough codes and registration requirements.
keyRules: Rental units must be registered with the Borough
Certificate of Habitability required before tenant occupancy
Landlords must maintain properties to housing code standards
Short-term rentals (under 30 days) are not permitted in residential zones
Inspections conducted at change of tenancy

other.title: Environmental Protection — Celery Farm
other.summary: The Celery Farm natural area is protected by borough ordinance and managed by the Fyke Nature Association.
keyRules: No motorized vehicles, bicycles, or horses on Celery Farm trails
Dogs must be leashed at all times on the preserve
No hunting, fishing, or trapping on the preserve
Trail hours are dawn to dusk; no nighttime access
No dumping, littering, or removal of plants and wildlife

other.title: Tree Removal
other.summary: Removal of significant trees on private property requires a permit.
keyRules: Permit required for removal of trees over a certain caliper on private property
Shade Tree Commission may require replacement plantings
Borough Shade Tree Commission manages public trees
Unauthorized removal of public trees subject to fines

schools.publicDistrict: Allendale Public Schools (K-8) / Northern Highlands Regional High School District (9-12)

publicSchools.name: Northern Highlands Regional High School
publicSchools.notes: Highly ranked regional high school serving Allendale, Ho-Ho-Kus, Saddle River, and Upper Saddle River; excellent academics, athletics, and college placement

publicSchools.name: Brookside School
publicSchools.notes: Upper elementary and middle school serving Allendale students

publicSchools.name: Hillside School
publicSchools.notes: Elementary school serving all Allendale students in grades K through 4

privateSchools.name: Academy of Our Lady of Mount Virgin
privateSchools.notes: Catholic elementary school located in nearby Middlesex but drawing some Allendale families

nearbyHigherEd: Ramapo College of New Jersey (Mahwah) — 10 minutes

whyMoveHere: Excellent schools including top-ranked Northern Highlands Regional High School
Small-town charm with a population under 7,000
NJ Transit Main Line train station for commuting to NYC
The Celery Farm — a premier birding and nature preserve
Safe, quiet neighborhoods with low crime rates
Strong community organizations and volunteer spirit

commuteToNYC.duration: 50-65 minutes to Hoboken, then PATH or ferry to Manhattan
commuteToNYC.notes: Allendale has its own NJ Transit train station on the Main Line, providing direct service to Hoboken Terminal. From Hoboken, commuters transfer to PATH trains or NY Waterway ferry to reach Manhattan. The 148 bus also provides service to the Port Authority Bus Terminal.

costOfLiving.summary: Allendale is an upper-middle-class Bergen County suburb with costs above state and national averages. Housing and property taxes are the primary drivers of the elevated cost of living.
costOfLiving.vsStateAverage: Approximately 40% above the New Jersey state average

pros: Top-ranked Northern Highlands Regional High School
Small-town feel with strong community bonds
Own NJ Transit train station for commuting
Beautiful natural areas including the Celery Farm
cons: High property taxes common to Bergen County
Very limited commercial and retail options in town
Small town center with few dining and entertainment choices
Train commute to Manhattan requires a Hoboken transfer
Limited housing inventory due to small borough size

restaurants.name: Allendale Bar & Grill
restaurants.description: Casual neighborhood restaurant and bar serving American fare including burgers, wings, and pub classics.

restaurants.name: Station Bistro
restaurants.description: Cozy bistro near the train station offering seasonal American cuisine with a focus on fresh, local ingredients.

restaurants.name: Nagoya Sushi & Thai
restaurants.description: Japanese and Thai restaurant serving sushi, sashimi, Thai curries, and noodle dishes.

parks.name: The Celery Farm
parks.description: A 107-acre freshwater wetland preserve managed by the Fyke Nature Association. One of New Jersey's premier birding sites, home to over 240 species of birds, plus amphibians, turtles, and native plants. Walking trails circle the marshes and Allendale Brook.

parks.name: Crestwood Park
parks.description: Borough park with ball fields, playground, basketball courts, and open space for family recreation.

parks.name: Memorial Park
parks.description: Community park featuring a playground, gazebo, and memorial area. A gathering spot for borough events.

events.name: Allendale Community Day
events.description: Annual community celebration with carnival rides, food trucks, games, and live entertainment for all ages.

events.name: Celery Farm Bird Walks
events.description: Guided bird walks led by the Fyke Nature Association through the Celery Farm preserve, welcoming birders of all skill levels.

events.name: Holiday Tree Lighting
events.description: Annual borough holiday celebration with tree lighting, caroling, and refreshments at Memorial Park.

events.name: Memorial Day Parade
events.description: Annual Memorial Day parade through the borough honoring veterans and active service members.

attractions.name: The Celery Farm Natural Area
attractions.description: A 107-acre freshwater wetland and birding preserve, recognized as one of New Jersey's most important birding sites. Maintained by the Fyke Nature Association with well-marked trails and viewing areas.

attractions.name: Allendale Train Station
attractions.description: Historic NJ Transit station on the Main Line, serving as the borough's connection to Hoboken and the NYC metro area. The station area is a center of the small downtown.

attractions.name: Lee Memorial Library
attractions.description: Allendale's public library offering an inviting space for reading, programs, and community events.

shoppingAreas: West Allendale Avenue — Small downtown with shops and restaurants near the train station
Franklin Turnpike — Some retail and service businesses
Ramsey shopping — Additional retail options in neighboring Ramsey
Paramus/Ridgewood — Major shopping centers within 15-20 minutes

government.meetingSchedule: Borough Council meets the 2nd and 4th Thursday of each month at 8:00 PM
government.meetingLocation: Borough Hall, 500 West Crescent Avenue, Allendale, NJ 07401

hospitals.name: Valley Hospital (Valley Health System)
hospitals.address: 223 North Van Dien Avenue, Ridgewood, NJ 07450

importantNumbers.label: Bergen County Office of Emergency Management
